theory.technical_interpretation: Definition of Gunif is an algebraic definition, written Gunif=(𝑔,ΩB. It is an algebraic definition expressing the quantity directly in terms of the variables on its right-hand side. It is built from B, defining Gunif. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.
